channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Celtics rally from 26-point deficit to top 76ers 118-110
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Jayson Tatum scored 13 of his 35 points in the fourth quarter and the Boston Celtics rallied from a 26-point deficit to beat the Philadelphia 76ers 118-110 on Sunday night. Tatum added 11 assists and seven rebounds.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Fans at Raptors game continue trend of booing US national anthem at pro sporting events in Canada
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Fans at a Toronto Raptors game continued an emerging trend Sunday of booing the American national anthem at pro sporting events in Canada.
item.dc:creator: IAN HARRISON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Doncic releases emotional farewell message to Dallas after trade sends him to Lakers
item.description: Luka Doncic released an emotional farewell to Dallas on the same day a trade sending him from the Mavericks to the Los Angeles Lakers in a swap for fellow All-NBA player Anthony Davis was finalized.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: What to know about security measures at the Super Bowl in New Orleans
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — After a New Year's Day attack struck at the heart of the French Quarter, officials in New Orleans say they are confident in the security plans they have in place for the Super Bowl. Upwards of 125,000 visitors are expected to converge on the Big Easy beginning Feb.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Luka Doncic heads to the Lakers and Anthony Davis goes to the Mavs in blockbuster trade
item.description: The trade was put together in secret, with only a precious few people knowing what was happening. Luka Doncic didn't know. Anthony Davis didn't know. Their coaches didn't know. Their teammates didn't know. And then it happened — an absolute blockbuster.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Eagles and Chiefs arrive in New Orleans for Super Bowl week
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The Philadelphia Eagles and Kansas City Chiefs have landed in New Orleans for Super Bowl week. They exited their planes to sunshine and temperatures in the 60s on Sunday afternoon, a week before their matchup on Feb. 9.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former LSU receivers score 8 times as the NFC tops the AFC in the Pro Bowl Games again, 76-63
item.description: Four ex-LSU players competing in the Pro Bowl Games scored a combined eight touchdowns in a flag football game that capped the NFC’s third consecutive victory over the AFC, 76-63 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Mark Long, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Veteran invites Navy friends to run Carlsbad Marathon
item.description: When most old buddies reconnect they grab a bite to eat. Ryan Le and his friends, however, they go for a run.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: PGA star Jason Day wears sweats at Pebble Beach, sparking social media stir, John Fetterman comparisons
item.description: Jason Day may have crossed the line with his outfit during the final round of this weekend's Pebble Beach Pro-Am, donning sweats head to toe.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Drew Brees serves up pickleball to beloved New Orleans
item.description: NEW ORLEANS - Drew Brees had his fair share of fun in New Orleans, taking the Saints to football heaven. Now. the future Hall of Famers found a second line of work, quarterbacking one of the fastest growing sports in America. "Look. I'm a sports junkie, right? I love ping pong. I love tennis.
item.dc:creator: Rick Tarsitano, WGN 9

item.title: Connecticut Sun bring Tina Charles back to the franchise a decade after trading her
item.description: Tina Charles is going back to Connecticut. The free agent center signed a one-year deal with the Sun on Sunday. “Today marks an incredible moment in our team’s history as we welcome back one of the greatest players to every grace the WNBA,” remarked Sun general manager Morgan Tuck.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Canadian fans boo U.S. National Anthem at hockey game amid trade war
item.description: Canadians aren’t too happy with the tariffs being imposed on their country by U.S. President Donald Trump. Trump signed an order Saturday to impose stiff tariffs on imports from Canada as well as Mexico and China, which drew swift retaliation and sparked a trade war.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: What to know as former Spain soccer official Rubiales goes on trial for unsolicited kiss of player
item.description: MADRID (AP) — The former president of the Spanish soccer federation goes on trial Monday accused of sexual assault for kissing forward Jenni Hermoso after Spain’s victory at the Women’s World Cup final in 2023.
item.dc:creator: TALES AZZONI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lakers, Mavericks pull off wild blockbuster as Luka Dončić, Anthony Davis swap teams: reports
item.description: In perhaps the most stunning deal of a generation, the Los Angeles Lakers have reportedly acquired Luka Dončić while sending Anthony Davis to the Mavericks,
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ottawa Senators fans boo USA national anthem after Trump issues tariffs
item.description: Ottawa Senators fans booed "The Star-Spangled Banner" on Saturday night, hours after President Donald Trump announced upcoming tariffs against Canada.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Calipari gets lukewarm response in return to Kentucky as Arkansas coach
item.description: LEXINGTON, Ky (AP) — John Calipari received a mixed reception on his return to Rupp Arena on Saturday night, then got the last laugh when his Arkansas Razorbacks beat No. 12 Kentucky 89-79. “It’s hard to win in here.
item.dc:creator: KEITH TAYLOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles' A.J. Brown recalls feeling like a 'paid actor' at previous Super Bowl, a loss to the Chiefs
item.description: Next Sunday's game between the AFC champion Kansas City Chiefs and NFC champion Philadelphia Eagles is a rematch of the 2023 Super Bowl, which Kansas City won.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Porzingis hits eight 3s, scores 34 as Bulls open 3-game road trip with blowout loss in Boston
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Kristaps Porzingis scored 26 of his season-high 34 points in the first half Wednesday night, and the Boston Celtics coasted to a 122-100 victory over the Bulls in the first game of Chicago's three-game road trip.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
